prompt: Verify that the sidebar UI renders correctly after my changes
expected_output: Skill checks for playwright-cli, detects dev server command from package.json, starts the server, spawns browser-verifier agent, captures screenshot, writes verification-result.json, and presents pass/fail summary
expectations: Dev server command is detected from package.json scripts (dev, start, or serve)
Output includes verification-result.json, screenshot.png, and verification-summary.md
